summary: Iteration 37 - Zerodha Stock Statement Parser Testing: All 10 backend tests passed. Parser correctly extracts 16 stock holdings from real Zerodha XLSX statement. All features verified: ticker format (.NS suffix), invested_value calculation (qty*avg_price), sector field, duplicate handling, Combined sheet skipping.

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only)

critical_code_review_comments: Parser correctly identifies Zerodha format: headers at row 22, data starts at row 23
Ticker column used as name when name column is missing (Zerodha uses Symbol instead of Name)
Invested value calculated correctly: quantity * average_price
Previous Closing Price column mapped as current_price
Sector field correctly extracted for all 16 stocks (ENERGY, FMCG, CHEMICALS, METALS, etc)
Combined sheet correctly skipped when Equity sheet already parsed (prevents duplicates)
Duplicate handling works: re-upload updates existing holdings via ISIN match

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used real Zerodha statement file at /tmp/zerodha_stocks_real.xlsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zerodha stock statement parser fully verified. Parser handles Zerodha format (headers at row 22, Symbol column, no Name/Invested columns). Demo user now has 23 holdings: 7 MF (6 Groww + 1 eCAS) + 16 Zerodha Stocks. Total invested: ₹140,613. Combined sheet correctly skipped. All stocks have .NS ticker suffix and sector field populated.
